title: Saudi Arabian Lamb Kebabs
description: A flavorful and aromatic dish inspired by the cuisine of Saudi Arabia, featuring tender lamb kebabs grilled to perfection.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, garlic, cumin, coriander, salt, and black pepper.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Brush the grill grates with oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes per side, or until cooked to your desired level of doneness.
Transfer the kebabs to a serving platter and garnish with chopped parsley.
Serve hot, with additional parsley and lemon wedges on the side.
